# Mina Rich Editor

> Mina Rich Editor is a free, open-source React block-based rich text editor with Notion-style blocks, built-in AI content generation, Y.js-powered real-time collaboration, and zero ProseMirror dependency — all in ~45KB gzipped.

## Key Facts
- License: MIT (free for commercial use)
- Bundle size: ~45KB gzipped
- Test coverage: 440+ tests
- Block types: 15+ (paragraphs, headings, lists, code, tables, images, toggles, etc.)
- Framework: React 18+ with TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
- No ProseMirror or Slate dependency

## Documentation
- [Installation](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/installation): Install with npx shadcn CLI
- [Usage](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/usage): Get started in 3 lines of code
- [AI Integration](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/ai-integration): OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Ollama support
- [Real-time Collaboration](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/collaboration): Y.js CRDT with cursor presence
- [Block Types](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/block-types): 15+ block types
- [CompactEditor](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/compact-editor): Lightweight embeddable variant
- [Text Formatting](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/text-formatting): Bold, italic, underline, code, highlight
- [Slash Commands](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/slash-commands): Notion-style command menu
- [Toolbars](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/toolbars): Floating selection toolbar
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/keyboard-shortcuts): Full shortcut reference
- [Markdown Rules](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/markdown-rules): Auto-converting markdown shortcuts
- [Drag and Drop](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/drag-and-drop): Block reordering
- [Image and Media](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/image-and-media): Upload, paste, resize
- [Tables](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/tables): Advanced table editing
- [Serialization](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/serialization): JSON, HTML, Markdown export
- [Hooks](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/hooks): React hooks reference
- [useEditorAPI](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/editor-api): Programmatic editor control
- [History System](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/history-system): Undo/redo
- [API Reference](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/docs/api-reference): Complete API docs

## Comparisons
- [Mina vs TipTap](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/tiptap): 45KB vs 120KB+, no ProseMirror dependency, built-in AI and collab
- [Mina vs Plate](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/plate)
- [Mina vs BlockNote](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/blocknote)
- [Mina vs Lexical](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/lexical)
- [Mina vs Editor.js](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/editor-js)
- [Mina vs Novel](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/novel)
- [Mina vs Quill](https://editor.mina-massoud.com/compare/quill)

## Links
- Website: https://editor.mina-massoud.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Mina-Massoud/Mina-Rich-Editor
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@mina-editor/core
- Demo: https://editor.mina-massoud.com/demo
